final:
// // This module implements a two-bit synchronous counter with load functionality. On the rising edge of the clock, if the reset signal is high, the counter resets to 0. If the load signal is low, it loads the provided 2-bit input data instead of incrementing. Otherwise, it decrements the counter by 1 on each clock cycle, effectively counting down from 3 to 0.
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input load,
    input reset,
    input [1:0] data_in,
    output reg [1:0] data_out
);always @(posedge clk or negedge reset) begin
        if(!reset) begin
            data_out <= 2'b0;
        end else if(load) begin
            data_out <= data_in;
        end else begin
            data_out <= data_out + 2'b1;
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a two-bit synchronous counter with load functionality. On the rising edge of the clock, if the reset signal is high, the counter resets to 0. If the load signal is low, it loads the provided 2-bit input data instead of incrementing. Otherwise, it decrements the counter by 1 on each clock cycle, effectively counting down from 3 to 0.
